strengths: 17+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum
Active AI-adjacent work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow infrastructure) shows real engagement with current AI tooling
Founder of GISCollective and consistent pattern of open-source platform building demonstrates builder credibility and entrepreneurial instinct
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — only ~1 year of AI-specific work since April 2025, far short of 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale'
No evidence of director-level strategic influence: no advising of strategic customers or partners, no org-wide technical leadership, no published AI thought leadership
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field; academic background is a BS in CS and a Fine Arts degree, with no signal of ML/AI depth
response.justification: The role is a Director-level individual contributor requiring recognized AI expertise, customer-facing strategic advisory work, and the ability to shape cloud/AI platform strategy at an organizational level. Bogdan is a capable, broadly experienced software engineer — his MCP and agentic tooling work at re:cinq is genuinely relevant — but that AI work began in April 2025, making it roughly 14 months of exposure rather than the depth the role implies. There is no evidence of him advising strategic customers, influencing executive stakeholders, speaking or publishing on AI strategy, or building AI-powered products that reached meaningful scale. His GISCollective platform shows entrepreneurial drive but is a niche open-source NGO tool, not a commercial AI product. The gap between his current profile (strong senior/staff IC) and the role's requirements (Director-equivalent AI strategist with customer-facing influence) is wide enough to disqualify.
